arguments.content:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Api
  version: 0.1.0
  description: Sayq POS API
servers:
  - url: /api
    description: Base API path
tags:
  - name: health
    description: Health operations
  - name: categories
    description: Product categories
  - name: products
    description: Product management
  - name: orders
    description: Order/transaction management
  - name: dashboard
    description: Dashboard and reporting
paths:
  /healthz:
    get:
      operationId: healthCheck
      tags: [health]
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthStatus"

  /categories:
    get:
      operationId: listCategories
      tags: [categories]
      summary: List all categories
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of categories
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Category"
    post:
      operationId: createCategory
      tags: [categories]
      summary: Create a category
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CategoryInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Category"

  /categories/{id}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateCategory
      tags: [categories]
      summary: Update a category
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CategoryUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated category
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Category"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteCategory
      tags: [categories]
      summary: Delete a category
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /products:
    get:
      operationId: listProducts
      tags: [products]
      summary: List all products
      parameters:
        - name: categoryId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: search
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: active
          in: query
          schema:
            type: boolean
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of products
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Product"
    post:
      operationId: createProduct
      tags: [products]
      summary: Create a product
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProductInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Product"

  /products/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getProduct
      tags: [products]
      summary: Get a product
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Product
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Product"
    patch:
      operationId: updateProduct
      tags: [products]
      summary: Update a product
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProductUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated product
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Product"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteProduct
      tags: [products]
      summary: Delete a product
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /orders:
    get:
      operationId: listOrders
      tags: [orders]
      summary: List orders
      parameters:
        - name: date
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of orders
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Order"
    post:
      operationId: createOrder
      tags: [orders]
      summary: Create an order
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/OrderInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Order"

  /orders/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getOrder
      tags: [orders]
      summary: Get an order with items
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Order detail
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/OrderDetail"

  /dashboard/summary:
    get:
      operationId: getDashboardSummary
      tags: [dashboard]
      summary: Get today's sales summary
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Dashboard summary
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/DashboardSummary"

  /dashboard/top-products:
    get:
      operationId: getTopProducts
      tags: [dashboard]
      summary: Get top selling products
      parameters:
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 5
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Top products
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/TopProduct"

  /dashboard/sales-chart:
    get:
      operationId: getSalesChart
      tags: [dashboard]
      summary: Get sales data for chart (last 7 days)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Sales chart data
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/SalesChartPoint"

components:
  schemas:
    HealthStatus:
      type: object
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
      required:
        - status

    Category:
      type: object
      required: [id, name]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        productCount:
          type: integer

    CategoryInput:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1

    CategoryUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1

    Product:
      type: object
      required: [id, name, price, stock, isActive]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        categoryId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        categoryName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        price:
          type: number
        stock:
          type: integer
        imageUrl:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        isActive:
          type: boolean

    ProductInput:
      type: object
      required: [name, price, stock]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
        categoryId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        price:
          type: number
          minimum: 0
        stock:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
        imageUrl:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        isActive:
          type: boolean

    ProductUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
        categoryId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        price:
          type: number
          minimum: 0
        stock:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
        imageUrl:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        isActive:
          type: boolean

    OrderItemInput:
      type: object
      required: [productId, quantity]
      properties:
        productId:
          type: integer
        quantity:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1

    OrderInput:
      type: object
      required: [items, paymentMethod, amountPaid]
      properties:
        cashierName:
          type: string
        paymentMethod:
          type: string
          enum: [cash, card, qris]
        amountPaid:
          type: number
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/OrderItemInput"

    OrderItem:
      type: object
      required: [id, productId, productName, quantity, priceAtSale, subtotal]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        productId:
          type: integer
        productName:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
        priceAtSale:
          type: number
        subtotal:
          type: number

    Order:
      type: object
      required: [id, total, paymentMethod, status, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        cashierName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        total:
          type: number
        amountPaid:
          type: number
        change:
          type: number
        paymentMethod:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        itemCount:
          type: integer

    OrderDetail:
      type: object
      required: [id, total, paymentMethod, status, createdAt, items]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        cashierName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        total:
          type: number
        amountPaid:
          type: number
        change:
          type: number
        paymentMethod:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/OrderItem"

    DashboardSummary:
      type: object
      required: [todayRevenue, todayOrders, totalProducts, lowStockCount, todayRevenueDiff, todayOrdersDiff]
      properties:
        todayRevenue:
          type: number
        todayOrders:
          type: integer
        totalProducts:
          type: integer
        lowStockCount:
          type: integer
        todayRevenueDiff:
          type: number
        todayOrdersDiff:
          type: number

    TopProduct:
      type: object
      required: [productId, productName, totalSold, totalRevenue]
      properties:
        productId:
          type: integer
        productName:
          type: string
        totalSold:
          type: integer
        totalRevenue:
          type: number

    SalesChartPoint:
      type: object
      required: [date, revenue, orders]
      properties:
        date:
          type: string
        revenue:
          type: number
        orders:
          type: integer

     1→# API Server
     2→
     3→We maintain a single API server in this monorepo built with Express 5 and Node. It implements the OpenAPI contract.
     4→
     5→## Runtime File Paths
     6→
     7→Server code is bundled by esbuild and runs from `dist/`, so `__dirname` and `import.meta.url` point at bundled output, not the source tree. Resolve runtime file paths from an explicit root, not relative to the module.
     8→
     9→For files that belong to the API server artifact, normalize to the workspace root first so development and production resolve the same location:
    10→
    11→```typescript
    12→const workspaceRoot = process.cwd().endsWith(path.join("artifacts", "api-server"))
    13→  ? path.resolve(process.cwd(), "../..")
    14→  : process.cwd();
    15→
    16→const uploadsDir = path.resolve(workspaceRoot, "artifacts/api-server/uploads");
    17→const dataDir = path.resolve(workspaceRoot, "artifacts/api-server/data");
    18→```
    19→
    20→This keeps paths stable when development commands run from `artifacts/api-server` and production commands run from the workspace root.
    21→
    22→## Logging
    23→
    24→The API server uses **pino** for structured JSON logging. All server-side code must use the shared logger instead of `console.log` or `console.error`.
    25→
    26→> **Note:** Older workspaces created before the structured-logging stack update may not have `pino-http` in `app.ts` or `src/lib/logger.ts`. Before following the guidance below, check whether `artifacts/api-server/src/lib/logger.ts` exists and `app.ts` mounts `pinoHttp(...)`. If they are missing, install `pino` and `pino-http` as dependencies and `pino-pretty` as a devDependency, create `src/lib/logger.ts` with the canonical content below, and add the canonical `pinoHttp` middleware in `app.ts` before the routes (see the **Canonical pino-http middleware** section below for the full snippet — do not use a bare `pinoHttp({ logger })` call, as the custom serializers are required to strip query strings and prevent sensitive data from leaking into logs). Also replace any existing `console.log` and `console.error` calls in server code (e.g. `index.ts`, route files) with the appropriate `logger` or `req.log` calls so all output is structured JSON.
    27→
    28→Canonical `artifacts/api-server/src/lib/logger.ts`:
    29→
    30→```typescript
    31→import pino from "pino";
    32→
    33→const isProduction = process.env.NODE_ENV === "production";
    34→
    35→export const logger = pino({
    36→  level: process.env.LOG_LEVEL ?? "info",
    37→  redact: [
    38→    "req.headers.authorization",
    39→    "req.headers.cookie",
    40→    "res.headers['set-cookie']",
    41→  ],
    42→  ...(isProduction
    43→    ? {}
    44→    : {
    45→        transport: {
    46→          target: "pino-pretty",
    47→          options: { colorize: true },
    48→        },
    49→      }),
    50→});
    51→```
    52→
    53→Import the logger (adjust the relative path based on file depth):
    54→
    55→```typescript
    56→// From src/index.ts:
    57→import { logger } from "./lib/logger";
    58→
    59→// From src/routes/*.ts or src/middlewares/*.ts:
    60→import { logger } from "../lib/logger";
    61→
    62→// From nested route directories like src/routes/todos/index.ts:
    63→import { logger } from "../../lib/logger";

    74→app.use(

    76→    logger,

    78→      req(req) {
    79→        return {
    80→          id: req.id,

Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of .local/skills/pnpm-workspace/references/db.md
     1→# Database (Drizzle ORM)
     2→
     3→## Schema location
     4→
     5→Each table goes in its own file under `lib/db/src/schema/`. Re-export from `lib/db/src/schema/index.ts`.
     6→
     7→## Pattern
     8→
     9→Every model file should define: the Drizzle table, an insert schema, and the derived types.
    10→
    11→```typescript
    12→import { pgTable, text, serial, timestamp } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core";
    13→import { createInsertSchema } from "drizzle-zod";
    14→import { z } from "zod/v4";
    15→
    16→export const todosTable = pgTable("todos", {
    17→  id: serial("id").primaryKey(),
    18→  title: text("title").notNull(),
    19→  completed: text("completed").notNull().default("false"),
    20→  createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).notNull().defaultNow(),
    21→  updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true }).notNull().defaultNow().$onUpdate(() => new Date()),
    22→});
    23→
    24→export const insertTodoSchema = createInsertSchema(todosTable).omit({ id: true, createdAt: true, updatedAt: true });
    25→export type InsertTodo = z.infer<typeof insertTodoSchema>;
    26→export type Todo = typeof todosTable.$inferSelect;
    27→```
    28→
    29→## Date columns
    30→
    31→Use `timestamp` for instants and `date` for calendar-only values:
    32→
    33→```typescript
    34→import { date, pgTable, timestamp } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core";
    35→
    36→export const jobsTable = pgTable("jobs", {
    37→  createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).notNull().defaultNow(),
    38→  scheduledDate: date("scheduled_date", { mode: "string" }).notNull(),
    39→});
    40→```
    41→
    42→```typescript
    43→await db.insert(jobsTable).values({ scheduledDate: data.scheduledDate });
    44→```
    45→
    46→Reasoning: `date(..., { mode: "string" })` stores a calendar day, not an instant. Keep those values as validated `YYYY-MM-DD` strings so the day is preserved; `Date`, `String(date)`, and `toISOString()` conversions can produce invalid or timezone-shifted values. Use real `Date` objects for `timestamp` columns.
    47→
    48→## Importing
    49→
    50→The `@workspace/db` package exports both the client and the full `src/schema` barrel, so prefer importing tables directly from `@workspace/db`:
    51→
    52→```typescript
    53→import { db } from "@workspace/db";
    54→import { todosTable } from "@workspace/db";
    55→```
    56→
    57→## Push commands
    58→
    59→```bash
    60→pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push
    61→# If it fails with column conflicts:
    62→pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push-force
    63→```
    64→
    65→## Pitfalls
    66→
    67→- Array columns: call `.array()` as a method on the column type — `text("tags").array()`, not `array(text("tags"))`.
    68→- Do not edit `drizzle.config.ts` unless absolutely necessary.
    69→- Use `timestamp(..., { withTimezone: true })` for instants and `date(..., { mode: "string" })` for calendar-only values.
    70→
Now I'll launch the design subagent async and build the backend at the same time.

arguments.code:
const result = await startAsyncSubagent({
    task: `Build the complete frontend for Sayq POS — a Point of Sale app for small businesses and retail shops in Indonesia. The app should feel fast, confident, and polished — like a cockpit where every control is exactly where you expect it. Dense with information but never cluttered. Make a bold, deliberate color choice that someone would remember.

Do not use emojis anywhere in the UI.

**Pages:**
- \`/\` → Kasir (cashier) — the main selling screen where staff browse products, add to cart, and complete transactions
- \`/orders\` → Riwayat Transaksi — list of all past orders with date filter and order detail view
- \`/products\` → Manajemen Produk — full CRUD for products and categories
- \`/dashboard\` → Laporan — sales summary, top products chart, 7-day sales trend

**Data types:**
- Category: { id, name, productCount }
- Product: { id, name, categoryId, categoryName, price, stock, imageUrl, isActive }
- Order: { id, cashierName, total, amountPaid, change, paymentMethod, status, createdAt, itemCount }
- OrderDetail: { ...Order, items: OrderItem[] }
- OrderItem: { id, productId, productName, quantity, priceAtSale, subtotal }
- DashboardSummary: { todayRevenue, todayOrders, totalProducts, lowStockCount, todayRevenueDiff, todayOrdersDiff }
- TopProduct: { productId, productName, totalSold, totalRevenue }
- SalesChartPoint: { date, revenue, orders }

**Available API hooks (import from \`@workspace/api-client-react\`):**
- useHealthCheck, getHealthCheckQueryKey
- useListCategories, getListCategoriesQueryKey
- useCreateCategory, useUpdateCategory, useDeleteCategory
- useListProducts(params?, options?), getListProductsQueryKey(params?)
- useGetProduct(id, options?), getGetProductQueryKey(id)
- useCreateProduct, useUpdateProduct, useDeleteProduct
- useListOrders(params?, options?), getListOrdersQueryKey(params?)
- useCreateOrder
- useGetOrder(id, options?), getGetOrderQueryKey(id)
- useGetDashboardSummary, getGetDashboardSummaryQueryKey
- useGetTopProducts(params?, options?), getGetTopProductsQueryKey(params?)
- useGetSalesChart, getGetSalesChartQueryKey

**Hook patterns:**
- Import hooks from \`@workspace/api-client-react\`, never relative paths
- Queries return T directly (not wrapped)
- Query options: useListProducts({ categoryId: 1 }, { query: { enabled: true } })
- Mutations: useCreateOrder().mutate({ data: { ... } })
- Use queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: getListProductsQueryKey() }) after mutations

**Use ALL the provided hooks.** The cashier page must let staff: browse products by category, search by name, add to cart, adjust quantities, choose payment method (cash/card/qris), enter amount paid, and complete the transaction. Display change amount for cash payments.

Prioritize clarity and polish — users spend hours here. Use recharts for the sales chart. Format currency as Rp (Indonesian Rupiah).

Supporting screens (empty states, loading states) deserve the same creative energy as the main screens.`,
    specialization: "DESIGN",
    relevantFiles: [
        "lib/api-client-react/src/generated/api.ts",
        "lib/api-client-react/src/generated/api.schemas.ts",
        "artifacts/pos-app/src/index.css",
        "artifacts/pos-app/src/App.tsx",
        "artifacts/pos-app/package.json",
        ".local/skills/react-vite/references/frontend_general_rules.md"
    ]
});
console.log(JSON.stringify(result));

Berikut panduan lengkap struktur kode proyek ini agar Anda bisa maintain dan tambah fitur dengan mudah:

---

## Struktur Folder

```
workspace/
├── lib/
│   ├── api-spec/          ← Kontrak API (openapi.yaml) — sumber kebenaran
│   ├── api-client-react/  ← Hooks React (hasil generate otomatis, JANGAN edit manual)
│   └── db/src/schema/     ← Skema database (Drizzle ORM)
│       ├── categories.ts
│       ├── products.ts
│       └── orders.ts
│
├── artifacts/
│   ├── api-server/src/    ← Backend (Express 5)
│   │   └── routes/
│   │       ├── categories.ts
│   │       ├── products.ts
│   │       ├── orders.ts
│   │       └── dashboard.ts
│   │
│   └── pos-app/src/       ← Frontend (React + Vite)
│       ├── pages/         ← Halaman utama
│       │   ├── cashier.tsx
│       │   ├── orders.tsx
│       │   ├── products.tsx
│       │   └── dashboard.tsx
│       ├── components/    ← Komponen reusable
│       └── lib/           ← Utilitas (format.ts, utils.ts)
```

---

## Cara Tambah Fitur Baru

### Contoh: Tambah tabel `discounts` ke database

**1. Buat file skema baru**
```
lib/db/src/schema/discounts.ts
```

**2. Export dari index**
```ts
// lib/db/src/schema/index.ts
export * from "./discounts";
```

**3. Push ke database**
```bash
pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push
```

---

### Contoh: Tambah endpoint API baru

**1. Tambahkan di `lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml`** — definisikan path & schema

**2. Jalankan codegen** (regenerate hooks otomatis)
```bash
pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen
```

**3. Buat file route baru**
```
artifacts/api-server/src/routes/discounts.ts
```

**4. Daftarkan di router**
```ts
// artifacts/api-server/src/routes/index.ts
import discountsRouter from "./discounts";
router.use(discountsRouter);
```

**5. Gunakan hook di frontend** (sudah ter-generate otomatis)
```ts
import { useListDiscounts } from "@workspace/api-client-react";
```

---

## Perintah Penting

| Tujuan | Perintah |
|---|---|
| Jalankan dev | Sudah otomatis via workflow Replit |
| Push skema DB | `pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push` |
| Regenerate API hooks | `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen` |
| Cek TypeScript | `pnpm run typecheck` |

---

## Tips Penting

- **Jangan edit file di `lib/api-client-react/src/generated/`** — file ini dibuat otomatis, akan tertimpa saat codegen
- **Semua perubahan database** harus lewat file `lib/db/src/schema/`, lalu jalankan `push`
- **Tambah halaman baru** cukup buat file di `artifacts/pos-app/src/pages/` lalu daftarkan di `App.tsx`
- **Format harga** gunakan fungsi `formatRp()` dari `@/lib/format`

Alur umumnya: **Schema DB → OpenAPI spec → Codegen → Backend route → Frontend page**

     6→# Clerk Auth
     7→
     8→## Overview
     9→
    10→Clerk Auth gives the user's app its own dedicated authentication system, powered by a Replit-provisioned Clerk tenant. End users sign up in the app and the builder gets full control over branding and login methods.
    11→- **Replit-managed**: Replit provisions the Clerk tenants and key automatically. No need to touch accounts/secrets manually and no Clerk dashboard access.
    12→- **Two isolated environments**: Development and Production have separate user stores — accounts/data do not cross over. Test keys are used during development and automatically swapped to live keys when the app is published.
    13→
    14→  **Expected during development — do NOT treat as a problem and do NOT try to "fix" it:**
    15→  - A `pk_test` Clerk publishable key in `.replit` config or environment
    16→  - Console logs that say things like "Clerk has been loaded with development keys" or otherwise warn about development keys
    17→- **Login methods**: email/password (with email verification) and SSO via Google, GitHub, Apple, and X; custom OAuth credentials supported in Production for branded consent screens
    18→- **Managed from the Auth pane**: user management and consent screen configuration managed from the builtin Auth pane
    19→- **Not supported today**: SMS/phone sign-in, MFA, organization tenants
    20→

    24→- User wants custom branding on login/signup screens

Do not ask the user for these values. 579→ 580→- `CLERK_SECRET_KEY` (secret): Auto-provisioned secret key 581→- `CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY` (secret): Auto-provisioned publishable key 582→- `VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY` (secret): Auto-provisioned publishable key 583→ 584→## Migrating from Replit Auth 585→ 586→When migrating an existing app from Replit Auth to Clerk, read the following references: 587→ 588→- `references/web-migration.md` — Web app migration (Express API server + React+Vite frontend): what to remove and what to transition. 589→- `references/expo-migration.md` — Expo mobile app migration: what to remove and what to transition. 590→ 591→## Troubleshooting 592→ 593→### Unauthorized (401) errors in the preview web app 594→ 595→When API requests from the web app return 401 Unauthorized, first check which platform you are debugging: 596→ 597→- **Web app:** auth uses Clerk session cookies. arguments.content:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Api
  version: 0.1.0
  description: Sayq POS API
servers:
  - url: /api
    description: Base API path
tags:
  - name: health
    description: Health operations
  - name: users
    description: User management
  - name: categories
    description: Product categories
  - name: products
    description: Product management
  - name: orders
    description: Order/transaction management
  - name: dashboard
    description: Dashboard and reporting
paths:
  /healthz:
    get:
      operationId: healthCheck
      tags: [health]
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthStatus"

  /users/sync:
    post:
      operationId: syncUser
      tags: [users]
      summary: JIT provision or update current user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/SyncUserInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Existing user updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AppUser"
        "201":
          description: New user created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AppUser"

  /users/me:
    get:
      operationId: getMe
      tags: [users]
      summary: Get current authenticated user
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Current user
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AppUser"

  /users:
    get:
      operationId: listUsers
      tags: [users]
      summary: List all users (owner/manager only)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of users
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/AppUser"

  /users/{id}/role:
    patch:
      operationId: updateUserRole
      tags: [users]
      summary: Update user role (owner only)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateRoleInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated user
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AppUser"

  /categories:
    get:
      operationId: listCategories
      tags: [categories]
      summary: List all categories
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of categories
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Category"
    post:
      operationId: createCategory
      tags: [categories]
      summary: Create a category
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CategoryInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Category"

  /categories/{id}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateCategory
      tags: [categories]
      summary: Update a category
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CategoryUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated category
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Category"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteCategory
      tags: [categories]
      summary: Delete a category
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /products:
    get:
      operationId: listProducts
      tags: [products]
      summary: List all products
      parameters:
        - name: categoryId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: search
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: active
          in: query
          schema:
            type: boolean
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of products
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Product"
    post:
      operationId: createProduct
      tags: [products]
      summary: Create a product
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProductInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Product"

  /products/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getProduct
      tags: [products]
      summary: Get a product
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Product
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Product"
    patch:
      operationId: updateProduct
      tags: [products]
      summary: Update a product
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProductUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated product
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Product"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteProduct
      tags: [products]
      summary: Delete a product
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /orders:
    get:
      operationId: listOrders
      tags: [orders]
      summary: List orders
      parameters:
        - name: date
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of orders
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Order"
    post:
      operationId: createOrder
      tags: [orders]
      summary: Create an order
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/OrderInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Order"

  /orders/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getOrder
      tags: [orders]
      summary: Get an order with items
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Order detail
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/OrderDetail"

  /dashboard/summary:
    get:
      operationId: getDashboardSummary
      tags: [dashboard]
      summary: Get today's sales summary
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Dashboard summary
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/DashboardSummary"

  /dashboard/top-products:
    get:
      operationId: getTopProducts
      tags: [dashboard]
      summary: Get top selling products
      parameters:
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 5
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Top products
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/TopProduct"

  /dashboard/sales-chart:
    get:
      operationId: getSalesChart
      tags: [dashboard]
      summary: Get sales data for chart (last 7 days)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Sales chart data
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/SalesChartPoint"

  /dashboard/cashier-performance:
    get:
      operationId: getCashierPerformance
      tags: [dashboard]
      summary: Get cashier performance stats
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Cashier performance
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/CashierPerformance"

components:
  schemas:
    HealthStatus:
      type: object
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
      required:
        - status

    AppUser:
      type: object
      required: [id, clerkId, email, name, role, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        clerkId:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [owner, manager, cashier]
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    SyncUserInput:
      type: object
      required: [email, name]
      properties:
        email:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string

    UpdateRoleInput:
      type: object
      required: [role]
      properties:
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [owner, manager, cashier]

    Category:
      type: object
      required: [id, name]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        productCount:
          type: integer

    CategoryInput:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1

    CategoryUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1

    Product:
      type: object
      required: [id, name, price, stock, isActive]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        categoryId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        categoryName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        price:
          type: number
        stock:
          type: integer
        imageUrl:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        isActive:
          type: boolean

    ProductInput:
      type: object
      required: [name, price, stock]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
        categoryId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        price:
          type: number
          minimum: 0
        stock:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
        imageUrl:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        isActive:
          type: boolean

    ProductUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
        categoryId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        price:
          type: number
          minimum: 0
        stock:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
        imageUrl:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        isActive:
          type: boolean

    OrderItemInput:
      type: object
      required: [productId, quantity]
      properties:
        productId:
          type: integer
        quantity:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1

    OrderInput:
      type: object
      required: [items, paymentMethod, amountPaid]
      properties:
        cashierName:
          type: string
        cashierId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        paymentMethod:
          type: string
          enum: [cash, card, qris]
        amountPaid:
          type: number
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/OrderItemInput"

    OrderItem:
      type: object
      required: [id, productId, productName, quantity, priceAtSale, subtotal]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        productId:
          type: integer
        productName:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
        priceAtSale:
          type: number
        subtotal:
          type: number

    Order:
      type: object
      required: [id, total, paymentMethod, status, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        cashierName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        cashierId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        total:
          type: number
        amountPaid:
          type: number
        change:
          type: number
        paymentMethod:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        itemCount:
          type: integer

    OrderDetail:
      type: object
      required: [id, total, paymentMethod, status, createdAt, items]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        cashierName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        cashierId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        total:
          type: number
        amountPaid:
          type: number
        change:
          type: number
        paymentMethod:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/OrderItem"

    DashboardSummary:
      type: object
      required: [todayRevenue, todayOrders, totalProducts, lowStockCount, todayRevenueDiff, todayOrdersDiff]
      properties:
        todayRevenue:
          type: number
        todayOrders:
          type: integer
        totalProducts:
          type: integer
        lowStockCount:
          type: integer
        todayRevenueDiff:
          type: number
        todayOrdersDiff:
          type: number

    TopProduct:
      type: object
      required: [productId, productName, totalSold, totalRevenue]
      properties:
        productId:
          type: integer
        productName:
          type: string
        totalSold:
          type: integer
        totalRevenue:
          type: number

    SalesChartPoint:
      type: object
      required: [date, revenue, orders]
      properties:
        date:
          type: string
        revenue:
          type: number
        orders:
          type: integer

    CashierPerformance:
      type: object
      required: [cashierId, cashierName, totalOrders, totalRevenue]
      properties:
        cashierId:
          type: integer
        cashierName:
          type: string
        totalOrders:
          type: integer
        totalRevenue:
          type: number

arguments.content:
- [Clerk Auth Setup](clerk-auth-setup.md) — Clerk provisioned; first user auto-gets owner role; subsequent users get cashier
- [RBAC Design](rbac-design.md) — 3 roles: owner/manager/cashier; enforced on both API (requireRole) and frontend (route guards + sidebar)

---
name: Clerk Auth Setup
description: Clerk is provisioned and wired. First registered user becomes owner automatically.
---

**Why:** First user should be the business owner; subsequent staff get cashier by default.

**How to apply:** JIT sync happens in UserSyncer component in App.tsx — calls POST /api/users/sync on every sign-in. The backend checks if users table is empty to assign owner role.

**Proxy middleware:** clerkProxyMiddleware.ts in artifacts/api-server/src/middlewares/ — mounts at CLERK_PROXY_PATH before cors/body parsing.

**Dev keys:** VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY is a pk_test_ key in dev. This is expected and not an error.

**publishableKeyFromHost:** Must be imported from `@clerk/react/internal`, not `@clerk/react`. Always use this, never the raw env var.

---
name: RBAC Design
description: Role-based access control for Sayq POS with 3 roles enforced at API and UI levels.
---

**Roles:** owner | manager | cashier (stored in users.role, default: cashier)

**API enforcement:** requireRole(...roles) middleware in artifacts/api-server/src/middlewares/requireAuth.ts — checks DB user role.

**Frontend enforcement:** ProtectedApp in App.tsx checks me.role from GET /api/users/me; hides/redirects routes.

**Sidebar visibility:**
- cashier: Kasir + Riwayat only
- manager: adds Produk + Laporan
- owner: adds Pengguna page

**Dashboard/Laporan endpoints (owner+manager only):** /dashboard/summary, /dashboard/top-products, /dashboard/sales-chart, /dashboard/cashier-performance

**cashierId on orders:** Orders table has cashier_id FK → users.id. Cashier page passes me.id + me.name from useGetMe() hook.

Implementasi RBAC dengan Google Auth sudah selesai dan berjalan! Berikut ringkasan lengkapnya:

<stdout>:

Semua berjalan sempurna! Berikut rangkuman lengkap yang sudah diimplementasikan:

---

## Yang Sudah Selesai

### Autentikasi (Clerk + Google SSO)
- Halaman login branded Sayq POS dengan Google SSO dan email/password
- Setiap user yang sign in otomatis tersinkron ke database (JIT provisioning)
- **User pertama** yang mendaftar otomatis mendapat role **Owner**
- User berikutnya otomatis mendapat role **Kasir**

### RBAC — 3 Level Akses

| Role | Akses |
|---|---|
| **Owner** | Kasir, Riwayat, Produk, Laporan, Pengguna |
| **Manager** | Kasir, Riwayat, Produk, Laporan |
| **Kasir** | Kasir & Riwayat saja |

- Menu di sidebar otomatis tersembunyi sesuai role
- Rute diblokir di frontend & diproteksi di backend API
- Owner bisa ubah role user lain dari halaman **Pengguna**

### Fitur Baru
- **Halaman Pengguna** (Owner only) — lihat semua user & ubah role langsung dari dropdown
- **Performa Kasir** di Dashboard — ranking kasir berdasarkan total transaksi & pendapatan
- Setiap transaksi menyimpan `cashier_id` (FK ke users) & nama kasir otomatis dari user yang login
- Nama kasir ditampilkan di modal pembayaran

### Cara Aktifkan Google Login
Klik **Auth** di toolbar Replit, lalu aktifkan **Google** sebagai provider login. Clerk akan otomatis menampilkan tombol "Continue with Google".

---

**Next, I can menambahkan fitur shift kasir — sehingga setiap kasir bisa membuka/menutup shift, dan laporan performa kasir bisa difilter per shift. Would you like me to do that?**

The following files were provided:
<file path="attached_assets/Pasted-Tolong-bangun-ekosistem-Advanced-POS-Audit-Multi-Branch_1780758484348.txt" lines="1-29" total_lines="29">
Tolong bangun ekosistem 'Advanced POS, Audit, & Multi-Branch' untuk bisnis F&B saya yang memiliki banyak cabang. Kerjakan secara bertahap dengan arsitektur berikut:

TAHAP 1: DATABASE SCHEMA (Multi-Branch, COGS, & BOM)
1. Buat tabel `branches` (id, name, location). Tambahkan `branch_id` ke tabel `users`, `orders`, `shift_audits`, dan inventori.
2. Buat tabel `ingredients` (bahan mentah: id, branch_id, name, unit, cost_price_per_unit, minimal_stock).
3. Buat tabel `semi_finished` (bahan setengah jadi: id, branch_id, name, unit, cost_price_per_unit).
4. Buat tabel `recipes` (Bill of Materials) untuk memetakan produk jadi ke bahan mentah/setengah jadi beserta takarannya.
5. Buat tabel `current_inventory` (id, branch_id, item_type, item_id, current_stock).
6. Buat tabel `stock_adjustments` (id, branch_id, item_type, item_id, adjustment_type [in/out/loss], quantity, purchase_price_total, notes, timestamp).
7. Update tabel `orders`: Tambahkan kolom `total_cogs` (Harga Pokok Penjualan) untuk mencatat modal.
8. Buat tabel `shift_audits` (id, branch_id, cashier_id, shift_start, shift_end, expected_stock_json, actual_stock_json, photo_proof_url, status [pending/verified/discrepancy], notes).

TAHAP 2: BACKEND LOGIC (Auto-Deduct, Alerts, & Moving Average COGS)
1. Moving Average Bahan Mentah: Saat ada barang masuk di `stock_adjustments`, wajibkan input `purchase_price_total`. Buat fungsi backend yang otomatis menghitung dan mengupdate `cost_price_per_unit` di tabel `ingredients` menggunakan rumus: ((Stok Lama * Harga Lama) + Total Harga Beli Baru) / (Stok Lama + Stok Baru).
2. COGS Bahan Setengah Jadi: Saat produksi bahan setengah jadi dicatat, ambil total nilai `cost_price_per_unit` dari bahan mentah yang digunakan, lalu simpan sebagai harga modal bahan setengah jadi tersebut.
3. Fungsi Transaksi (Auto-Deduct): Saat order selesai, potong stok di `current_inventory` sesuai komposisi resep. Hitung `total_cogs` pesanan dari harga rata-rata bahan dan simpan ke data transaksi.
4. Low Stock Alert: Buat endpoint yang memonitor `current_inventory` dan mengembalikan data item yang stoknya di bawah 200 (gram/ml).

TAHAP 3: SISTEM KASIR, AUDIT SHIFT & RESTOCK
1. Tambahkan fitur 'Barang Masuk (Restock)' di UI Kasir/Manajer agar bisa menambah stok di tengah shift jika supplier datang.
2. Halaman Tutup Shift: Hilangkan input stok awal manual (ambil otomatis dari database). Kasir wajib menginput angka sisa fisik cup dan menimbang sisa bahan.
3. Integrasikan Web Camera di form Tutup Shift agar kasir wajib mengambil foto bukti timbangan sebelum mengirim laporan.

TAHAP 4: DASHBOARD OWNER UI
1. Filter Cabang: Buat 'Branch Switcher' di Navbar agar saya bisa melihat data per cabang atau akumulasi semua cabang.
2. Notifikasi Inventori: Tambahkan widget tabel 'LOW STOCK ALERT' (berkedip/merah) di dashboard utama untuk item dengan stok < 200.
3. Laporan Keuangan: Tampilkan Gross Revenue, Total COGS, dan Gross Profit yang dihitung secara mutakhir.
4. Verifikasi Audit: Buat halaman komparasi yang menandingkan Data POS vs Input Fisik Kasir. Beri label 'WARNING' merah jika terdapat selisih (discrepancy) > 5%, beserta tombol untuk validasi dan sinkronisasi stok ke shift berikutnya.

</file>

# Objective
Build "Advanced POS, Audit & Multi-Branch" ecosystem for F&B (Sayq POS). 4 stages.

# Tasks

### T001: Stage 1 — DB Schema (multi-branch, COGS, BOM)
- **Blocked By**: []
- branches; add branch_id to users/orders/shift_audits/inventory
- ingredients, semi_finished, recipes (BOM), current_inventory, stock_adjustments
- orders.total_cogs; shift_audits table
- Push schema, seed default branch + assign existing data
- Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push` succeeds

### T002: Stage 2 — Backend Logic
- **Blocked By**: [T001]
- Moving average COGS on stock-in
- Semi-finished COGS from recipe
- Auto-deduct inventory on order + compute total_cogs
- Low stock alert endpoint (< 200)
- OpenAPI spec + codegen
- Acceptance: routes typecheck, endpoints work

### T003: Stage 3 — Cashier, Shift Audit & Restock UI
- **Blocked By**: [T002]
- Restock (Barang Masuk) UI
- Close shift page (auto expected stock, physical input)
- Web camera photo proof (object storage)
- Acceptance: flows work end-to-end

### T004: Stage 4 — Owner Dashboard UI
- **Blocked By**: [T002]
- Branch switcher in navbar
- Low stock alert widget (red/blink)
- Financial report: Gross Revenue, Total COGS, Gross Profit
- Audit verification page (POS vs physical, WARNING > 5%)
- Acceptance: dashboard renders, all data correct

arguments.old_string:
components:
  schemas:
    HealthStatus:
arguments.new_string:
/branches:
    get:
      operationId: listBranches
      tags: [branches]
      summary: List all branches
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of branches
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Branch"
    post:
      operationId: createBranch
      tags: [branches]
      summary: Create a branch
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/BranchInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Branch"

  /ingredients:
    get:
      operationId: listIngredients
      tags: [ingredients]
      summary: List ingredients (raw materials) with live stock
      parameters:
        - name: branchId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of ingredients
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Ingredient"
    post:
      operationId: createIngredient
      tags: [ingredients]
      summary: Create an ingredient
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/IngredientInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Ingredient"

  /ingredients/{id}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateIngredient
      tags: [ingredients]
      summary: Update an ingredient
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/IngredientUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Ingredient"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteIngredient
      tags: [ingredients]
      summary: Delete an ingredient
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /semi-finished:
    get:
      operationId: listSemiFinished
      tags: [semiFinished]
      summary: List semi-finished goods with live stock
      parameters:
        - name: branchId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of semi-finished goods
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/SemiFinished"
    post:
      operationId: createSemiFinished
      tags: [semiFinished]
      summary: Create a semi-finished good
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/SemiFinishedInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/SemiFinished"

  /semi-finished/{id}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateSemiFinished
      tags: [semiFinished]
      summary: Update a semi-finished good
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/SemiFinishedUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/SemiFinished"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteSemiFinished
      tags: [semiFinished]
      summary: Delete a semi-finished good
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /semi-finished/{id}/produce:
    post:
      operationId: produceSemiFinished
      tags: [semiFinished]
      summary: Record production of a semi-finished good (deducts ingredients, computes COGS)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProduceInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Produced
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/SemiFinished"

  /recipes:
    get:
      operationId: getRecipe
      tags: [recipes]
      summary: Get the BOM components for a parent
      parameters:
        - name: parentType
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [product, semi_finished]
        - name: parentId
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Recipe components
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/RecipeComponent"
    put:
      operationId: setRecipe
      tags: [recipes]
      summary: Replace the BOM for a parent
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/SetRecipeInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated recipe
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/RecipeComponent"

  /inventory:
    get:
      operationId: listInventory
      tags: [inventory]
      summary: Get live inventory for a branch
      parameters:
        - name: branchId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Inventory items
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/InventoryItem"

  /inventory/low-stock:
    get:
      operationId: getLowStock
      tags: [inventory]
      summary: Get inventory items below the low-stock threshold
      parameters:
        - name: branchId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: threshold
          in: query
          schema:
            type: number
            default: 200
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Low stock items
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/InventoryItem"

  /stock-adjustments:
    get:
      operationId: listStockAdjustments
      tags: [inventory]
      summary: List stock adjustment history
      parameters:
        - name: branchId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Adjustment history
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/StockAdjustment"
    post:
      operationId: createStockAdjustment
      tags: [inventory]
      summary: Record a stock adjustment (in/out/loss); 'in' triggers moving-average COGS
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/StockAdjustmentInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/StockAdjustment"

  /shift-audits:
    get:
      operationId: listShiftAudits
      tags: [shiftAudits]
      summary: List shift audits
      parameters:
        - name: branchId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Shift audits
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/ShiftAudit"
    post:
      operationId: createShiftAudit
      tags: [shiftAudits]
      summary: Close a shift and submit physical counts
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ShiftAuditInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ShiftAudit"

  /shift-audits/expected:
    get:
      operationId: getExpectedStock
      tags: [shiftAudits]
      summary: Get current expected stock snapshot for closing a shift
      parameters:
        - name: branchId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Expected stock snapshot
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/InventoryItem"

  /shift-audits/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getShiftAudit
      tags: [shiftAudits]
      summary: Get a shift audit with reconciliation detail
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Shift audit detail
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ShiftAuditDetail"

  /shift-audits/{id}/verify:
    patch:
      operationId: verifyShiftAudit
      tags: [shiftAudits]
      summary: Validate audit and sync physical stock to inventory
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Verified
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ShiftAudit"

  /uploads/sign:
    post:
      operationId: signUpload
      tags: [shiftAudits]
      summary: Get a presigned URL for uploading a photo proof
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Upload target
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/UploadTarget"

  /dashboard/financial:
    get:
      operationId: getFinancialReport
      tags: [dashboard]
      summary: Get gross revenue, COGS and gross profit
      parameters:
        - name: branchId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: days
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 30
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Financial report
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/FinancialReport"

components:
  schemas:
    HealthStatus:
